name: Onion Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large skillet, melt the butter with the oil over medium heat.
3. Cook the onion slowly until tender and golden, about 30 minutes. Do not brown the onions.
4. Butter a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Butter each bread slice lightly on both sides. Cut into cubes and spread half of them in the bottom of the dish.
6. Sprinkle with the cooked onions.
7. Top with the remaining bread cubes.
8. Whisk together the milk, cream, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, parsley, salt to taste, and pepper.
9. Pour over the bread mixture.
10. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
11. Bake until the pudding is fluffy and the top is crispy golden brown, about 45 to 50 minutes.
